what_it_does: This file is a minimal channel attachment record in YAML frontmatter that links an attachment identifier to a board item target within the dragnet-development channel.
observations: Contains only YAML frontmatter metadata and no body content
standouts: The file is purely a typed reference to a board item rather than containing the attached content itself
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item
Records an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
concerns: No payload or content is included, so the nature of the attachment is opaque from this file alone
notes: This is a dated metadata stub that records a board_items attachment pointing to board item item-17bea2b3 in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What is the content or purpose of board item item-17bea2b3?
What data or artifact is actually attached via this record?
Who added the attachment and why?
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a traceable, timestamped association between a channel discussion artifact and a specific board item for later retrieval or context.
contribution: Provides a dated, typed edge connecting the dragnet-development channel to a board item, which a fused system could use to reconstruct when and how channel content was linked to board items.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking dragnet-development to board item item-17bea2b3 as a board_items attachment with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board_items attachment referencing board item item-17bea2b3 was added to the dragnet-development channel at a specific time.
